introSection: Spinning Lady Bug Coaster was a spinning steel roller coaster built by Italian firm SBF Visa Group previously located at Edaville Family Theme Park in Carver, Massachusetts, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride was sold at auction on April 30, 2025 for $24,000.

fullText:
Spinning Lady Bug Coaster was a spinning steel roller coaster built by Italian firm SBF Visa Group previously located at Edaville Family Theme Park in Carver, Massachusetts, USA.

The ride was sold at auction on April 30, 2025 for $24,000.
